title: Riding Partners：Reforged
description: Allows players to team up and ride on the same horse in Minecraft.
body:
# Riding Partners: Reforged

A horse can be ridden by two players simultaneously.

## Introduce

This mod is a ported version of [Riding Partners](https://modrinth.com/mod/riding-partners) Forge, which has been ported to the 1.20.1 Forge version based on the original mod.

## Features

- Allows two players to mount the same horse.
- Rider has control over horse's movements.
- Passenger can sit back and enjoy the ride.
- Players can switch positions at any time.
- Improves efficiency of exploration.

### WARN ：

Please do not submit any bugs related to this mod to the official issue！
